title: Create: Sable Train Overlay Compat (Aeronautics)
description: Making the trains that are in the assembled create aeronautics or sable sub-levels appear in Create's Built in Train Network Overlay.
body:
# Create: Sable Train Overlay Compat (Aeronautics)
Basically making the Create trains that are in the assembled create aeronautics or sable sub-levels appear in Create's Built in Train Network Overlay.

# The Problem:
Create's Built in Train Network Overlay cannot see the trains that are inside the assembled Create Aeronautics Contraption / Sable sub-level. This mod fixes that.

## With The mod:
![Train Inside the Create Aeronautics contraption or Sable Sub-level appears on the map](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d0bd8f4f5f701611b5bc7e1a4fd38d8dadd23f10.png)
(Train inside the assembled Create Aeronautics Contraption appears in Train Network Overlay)

# Limitations
- Create Train tracks and Stations doesn't appear
- It disappears when you go far away from it
